data.en: They're singing and dancing.
data.cn: 他们正在唱歌跳舞。
accept: They are singing and dancing.

data.en: They're having a party.
data.cn: 他们正在开派对。
accept: They are having a party.

data.en: It's raining.
data.cn: 正在下雨。
accept: It is raining.

data.en: What are they doing?
data.cn: 他们在做什么？

data.en: They are very happy, but we are not!
data.cn: 他们很高兴，但我们不是！
data.hint: Contrast with 'but' / 用 'but' 表示转折

data.en: It's very cold!
data.cn: 太冷了！
accept: It is very cold!

data.en: Daming is having a birthday party.
data.cn: 大明正在举办生日派对。

data.en: He is playing the suona, but the phone rings.
data.cn: 他正在吹唢呐，但是电话响了。
data.hint: Continuous action interrupted / 进行中的动作被打断
accept: He's playing the suona, but the phone rings.

data.en: He stops and everyone waits.
data.cn: 他停下来，大家都在等。
data.hint: Third-person singular verbs / 第三人称单数动词

data.en: Daming is playing the suona again.
data.cn: 大明又在吹唢呐了。
data.hint: Adverb of frequency / 频率副词

data.en: But the bell rings.
data.cn: 但是铃响了。

data.en: "Stop!" says Simon.
data.cn: “停下！”西蒙说。
accept: Simon says, "Stop!"

data.en: Daming stops.
data.cn: 大明停了下来。
data.hint: Third-person singular verb / 第三人称单数动词

data.en: More friends come in.
data.cn: 更多的朋友进来了。

data.en: Simon's dog comes in too.
data.cn: 西蒙的狗也进来了。

data.en: Daming is playing the suona for the third time.
data.cn: 大明第三次吹唢呐。

data.en: But the dog starts to bark very loudly.
data.cn: 但是狗开始很大声地叫。
data.hint: Start to do something / 开始做某事

data.en: His friends can't hear him.
data.cn: 他的朋友们听不到他的声音。
accept: His friends can not hear him.

data.en: The dog stops.
data.cn: 狗停了下来。
data.hint: Third-person singular / 第三人称单数

data.en: They all laugh.
data.cn: 他们都笑了。

data.en: He's crossing the street, but a car comes.
data.cn: 他正在过马路，但是一辆车过来了。
data.hint: Continuous action + but / 正在进行的动作 + but
accept: He is crossing the street, but a car comes.

data.en: He's eating dinner, but the phone rings.
data.cn: 他正在吃晚饭，但是电话响了。
accept: He is eating dinner, but the phone rings.

data.en: She's talking to her friend, but the bell rings.
data.cn: 她正和朋友说话，但是铃响了。
data.hint: Talk to someone / 和某人说话
accept: She is talking to her friend, but the bell rings.

data.en: She's doing her homework, but the dog starts to bark.
data.cn: 她正在做作业，但是狗开始叫了。
accept: She is doing her homework, but the dog starts to bark.

data.en: He's riding his bike, but it starts to rain.
data.cn: 他正在骑自行车，但是开始下雨了。
data.hint: Ride a bike / 骑自行车
accept: He is riding his bike, but it starts to rain.

data.en: The bell is ringing.
data.cn: 铃正在响。

data.en: The dog is barking.
data.cn: 狗正在叫。

data.en: Little Tom is crying.
data.cn: 小汤姆正在哭。

data.en: But Sam knows nothing.
data.cn: 但是萨姆什么都不知道。
data.hint: Third-person singular verbs / 第三人称单数

data.en: She's having lunch, but the phone rings.
data.cn: 她正在吃午饭，但是电话响了。
accept: She is having lunch, but the phone rings.

data.en: She's doing exercise, but it gets too hot.
data.cn: 她正在做运动，但是天气变得太热了。
accept: She is doing exercise, but it gets too hot.

data.en: He's walking in the park, but it starts to snow.
data.cn: 他正在公园散步，但是开始下雪了。
data.hint: Walk in the park / 在公园散步
accept: He is walking in the park, but it starts to snow.

data.en: She's watching TV, but the bell rings.
data.cn: 她正在看电视，但是门铃响了。
accept: She is watching TV, but the bell rings.

data.en: He's reading a book, but his sister starts to sing.
data.cn: 他正在看书，但是他姐姐开始唱歌。
accept: He is reading a book, but his sister starts to sing.

data.en: They are having a picnic, but it starts to rain.
data.cn: 他们正在野餐，但是开始下雨了。
accept: They're having a picnic, but it starts to rain.

data.en: I am flying in the sky.
data.cn: 我正在天空中飞翔。
data.hint: Fly in the sky / 在天空中飞翔
accept: I'm flying in the sky.

data.en: My mum is waving to say goodbye.
data.cn: 我妈妈正在挥手说再见。
data.hint: Wave to say goodbye / 挥手说再见

data.en: It is getting very dark.
data.cn: 天变得很黑。
accept: It's getting very dark.

data.en: The boys are playing football, but it rains.
data.cn: 男孩们正在踢足球，但是下雨了。
data.hint: Plural noun subject / 复数名词主语

data.en: We are singing, but the baby cries.
data.cn: 我们正在唱歌，但是婴儿哭了。
accept: We're singing, but the baby cries.

data.en: He is playing chess, but his brother comes.
data.cn: 他正在下棋，但是他哥哥来了。
accept: He's playing chess, but his brother comes.

data.en: They are running, but it starts to rain.
data.cn: 他们正在跑步，但是开始下雨了。
accept: They're running, but it starts to rain.

data.en: She is drawing a picture, but the phone rings.
data.cn: 她正在画画，但是电话响了。
accept: She's drawing a picture, but the phone rings.

data.en: We are watching a movie, but the dog barks.
data.cn: 我们正在看电影，但是狗叫了。
accept: We're watching a movie, but the dog barks.

data.en: The teacher is talking, but the bell rings.
data.cn: 老师正在讲话，但是铃响了。

data.en: I am sleeping, but the alarm goes off.
data.cn: 我正在睡觉，但是闹钟响了。
accept: I'm sleeping, but the alarm goes off.

data.en: He is driving a car, but it gets dark.
data.cn: 他正在开车，但是天变黑了。
accept: He's driving a car, but it gets dark.

data.en: She is eating an apple, but it is bad.
data.cn: 她正在吃苹果，但是苹果坏了。
data.hint: Use 'an' before vowels / 在元音前用 'an'
accept: She's eating an apple, but it's bad.

data.en: They are swimming, but it gets cold.
data.cn: 他们正在游泳，但是变冷了。
accept: They're swimming, but it gets cold.

data.en: We are walking, but a car comes.
data.cn: 我们正在走路，但是来了一辆车。
data.hint: Continuous action interrupted / 进行中的动作被打断
accept: We're walking, but a car comes.
